description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel circular case, has a textured fixed bezelDial style: Off-white dial with branding below the 12 hour mark, has rose gold toned hands with white inlay, has black and rose gold toned markings, two chronograph dials with a date and day displayFeatures: Screw to reset timeStrap style: Black, textured leather strap with a tang claspWater resistantComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year from the date of purchase
